description: Create a Retro-Cue Visual Working Memory experiment in PsychoPy Builder. A retro-cue task tests memory by presenting items, then using a cue during the delay to direct internal attention to one item before a probe appears. The experiment requires a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/retrocue/conditions.csv containing 6 rows with columns for left_color, right_color, cue_dir, probe_color, and corr_resp (using standard color names, 'left' or 'right' for cue_dir, and 'y' or 'n' for corr_resp logic). The experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/retrocue/retrocue_task.psyexp must implement a loop with a routine sequence consisting of encoding (1s display of $left_color and $right_color squares), delay1 (1s blank), cue (0.5s display based on $cue_dir), delay2 (1s blank), and a probe (central $probe_color square accepting 'y' or 'n' keypresses). Generate experimental data in the data/ folder by running the completed experiment once.
